# Class: Matcher

Defined in: [core/matching/match.ts:69](https://github.com/jterrazz/package-test/blob/main/src/core/matching/match.ts#L69)

A dynamic-value matcher. Created via the [match](../variables/match.md) factories — never
constructed directly by user code.
